name: HUG E-Lhee The Musical
original_name: มนต์รักฮักอิหลี
overview: Noi, the son of a som tam restaurant owner, is stuck working as a waiter though he dreams of being a singer. When his mother falls ill, she entrusts him with the business. He's soon set an additional challenge when a man from the big city moves into town and opens a rival fusion restaurant.

trailers.title: OFFICIAL PILOT | มนต์รักฮักอิหลี | HugELhee The Musical
